top.title: No deal announced after Trump meeting to make 'final determination' on Iran
top.summary: The US president met his advisers, after officials confirmed the US and Iran had agreed a framework of a deal.

top.title: US not 'turning back' on Asia allies, but expects them to boost defence - Hegseth
top.summary: The US defense secretary is questioned about US commitment, including further arms deals, at an Asian security summit in Singapore.

top.title: 'Poison seller' who sold toxic chemicals online to people across world admits aiding suicides
top.summary: Kenneth Law admitted charges relating to Canadian victims - but families say he should also be charged in the UK over 79 deaths in Britain.

top.title: 'Controversial' North Korean invasion setting for next Call of Duty game
top.summary: Developer Infinity Ward said the game will be "grounded in the military authenticity" the series is known for.

top.title: Humanoid robots 'the future' of car making, says BMW
top.summary: BMW is introducing humanoid robots to a car plant in Europe, building on similar projects in the US.

top.title: California Attorney General sues 23andMe successor for 2023 data breach
top.summary: Attorney General Rob Bonta alleges the company lied about the breach's severity.
